name: Sam Buchanan, Regional Manager, Buchanan Group. Coast2Coast Mortgage Lending. Zillow Mortgage Partner & U.S Veteran.
description_short: Sam Buchanan is a Regional Manager at Buchanan Mortgage Group and Coast2Coast Mortgage Lending, a Zillow Mortgage Partner with 20+ years in the lending industry based in Nashville, TN.
description_long:
Sam Buchanan has been operating in the mortgage lending industry since 2000, bringing over two decades of experience to his role as Regional Manager at Buchanan Mortgage Group. He operates through Coast2Coast Mortgage Lending and is featured as a Zillow Mortgage Partner, indicating a formal partnership with one of the largest real estate platforms in the United States. As a U.S. Veteran, Buchanan brings additional perspective to his work in home financing.

Buchanan offers comprehensive mortgage lending services through his Nashville-based office located at 1705 Division Street. His services include mortgage pre-qualification, home loan applications, and mortgage rate consultations. As a Zillow partner, customers can access his services through Zillow's Home Loans platform, which provides tools like mortgage payment calculators, current rate information, and home financing education resources.

What distinguishes Buchanan is his established presence and track record on the Zillow platform, evidenced by a 4.91-star rating across 92 reviews with 39 verified reviews. His two-decade tenure in the industry suggests deep relationships within the Tennessee lending market, particularly in the Nashville area. His military background and emphasis on customer education throughout the home-buying process may appeal to veterans and first-time homebuyers seeking personalized guidance.

A key limitation is that detailed service information is limited on the provided Zillow profile. While his Coast2Coast Mortgage Lending website is referenced, specific loan products, rates, qualification requirements, and specialized offerings (FHA, VA, refinance options) are not detailed in the available content. Prospective borrowers would need to contact him directly or visit his external website to understand the full scope of available products and whether their specific financing needs can be met.
pros: 20+ years of mortgage lending experience since 2000
4.91-star rating with 92 reviews and 39 verified customer reviews on Zillow
Affiliated with Zillow Mortgage Partner program for credibility and platform access
U.S. Veteran status may provide specialized knowledge for VA loan products
Based in Nashville with established local market presence and relationships
Multiple contact methods available (office, cell, fax, website)
Emphasis on customer education and home-buying decision support per profile description
cons: Limited product detail provided on Zillow profile—specific loan types not clearly listed
No information about interest rates, fees, or APR ranges available
Qualification requirements and minimum credit score thresholds not specified
No mention of specialized products like jumbo loans, investment properties, or non-traditional financing
All contact must go through a single individual (Regional Manager), limiting accessibility
best_for: Tennessee homebuyers, particularly in the Nashville area seeking local lender relationships
U.S. Veterans interested in VA loan products from a veteran-owned lending operation
First-time homebuyers who value personalized guidance and education throughout the process
diagnosis: Sam Buchanan is best suited for Tennessee-based homebuyers and potential U.S. Veterans seeking a mortgage lender with deep local market knowledge and a strong track record. The main caveat is that his Zillow profile lacks specifics about loan products, rates, and terms—interested borrowers must contact him directly or visit his Coast2Coast Mortgage Lending website to confirm whether his offerings match their financing needs.
services: Loan application processing through Zillow Home Loans dashboard
Potential FHA/VA loan products (not explicitly confirmed)
